title: Danmu 40ml Small Glass Bottles, Mini Bottles, Jars with Wood Cork Stoppers, Wish Bottles, Message Bottles for Wedding Favors, Baby Shower Favors, DIY Craft 12 Pack 1.18" x 3.14"
description:
About this item
These small glass jars with corks are great for DIY for perfume bottles. Mini bottles are also suitable for interchangeable pendant art pieces, message in a bottle charms, keepsake charms, and much more
Spell Jars Size: 30mm x 80mm / 1.18" x 3.14" Bottle Capacity: 40 ml. Quantity: 12 Pack
Danmu small glass bottles are ideal for wedding decoration, home and garden decoration, baby shower decoration and other party decorations. Fill these tiny bottles with luminous colored sand, you will light up your fairy garden
Clear glass for seeing the items in it, great for DIY and art decoration. These cute glass bottles with cork are great for jewelry making, altered art, miniature art, etc.
Danmu is a registered brand. Danmu aims to provide the best service to our customers, please buy with confidence!
› See more product details
reviews_5s:
These worked perfect for our shots of polyjuice potion for our Harry Potter party. Easy to open but corks stay sealed. High quality item. So fun!Very nice and cute little jars that are perfect for spell jars. Just big enough to put in a bay leaf, spices, crystals, etc. to make your special spell jars...put in the cork and seal with wax! voila!I bought a few of these to make ‘party potions’ for a D&D game and they worked great! I will continue to use them as they make a decent looking ‘potion’ and are also perfectly measured to a shot. Filling these up to the ‘curve in the glass’ at the top is a good shot (do not fill them all the way to the top).

I have had one of these fall from a table onto a hard floor, at about 3’ high and it made a loud noise but survived crack and knick-free. I thought for sure it was going to break but it surprised me.Play Video
These are very cute perfect for my party favorsThese are simple, to the point, cheaper glass 'vials' almost. I've been using them to store fountain pen inks and they are perfect. They're not airtight if that matters or sealed beyond just how hard you press the cork in but they serve this purpose just fine. They are glass and not some weird pseudo-glass plastic. They come in a staggered array in a cardboard container, so try not to jostle too much.I used these for my Fortnite birthday party and as you can see they are perfect to use for creating little mini shield potion shots/drinks for a fortnite party! I will say they are very delicate. Don’t drop them they would for sure shatter easilyThese little bottles are well made. They can be used to store a lot of things. I personally use them to store my seed beads . Great buy .Perfect! Cork works well and they are nicely packed.I put in some stars and crushed water beads, great gift for friends and family,Good deal good product
reviews_1s: Great jars, but the cork lids need to be bigger- they don't stay secure and it results in whatever is in the bottle to either leak, or spill out completely.Broken!!!Anti union so of course it’s poorly madeI could not even use the item for a single time not even once this is because the corks of low quality almost like they’re defective, and upon trying to remove them, they crumble/breakdown into small little fine bits
